GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when the user wants predictions for likely outcomes of submitted applications.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user asks to predict application outcomes, use KnowledgeSpaceAgent__KnowledgeSpaceDeepResearch.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only predict application outcomes using available data and machine learning models. You cannot make final decisions or modify application details.
